svg.title: After: native AIO pipeline
svg.desc: The restorer prepares a list of iocbs each describing a file offset, byte count, and destination iovec. It submits a batch via io_submit, and the AIO context holds a sliding window of up to 128 in-flight reads. The storage device runs many of those reads concurrently across its internal channels. Completions are reaped in batches by io_getevents and immediately backfilled with new submissions. Bytes scatter directly into the same VMA pages on the right — heap, stack, anonymous mappings, copy-on-write file pages — at the exact virtual addresses they need to live at.
